title: Summary: Turn 16
content: Pueblo is a CLI code agent built with TypeScript and Node.js (Node.js 22 LTS required). Features include CLI/desktop integration, GitHub Copilot and DeepSeek provider support, session management, tool utilities (grep, glob, exec), and SQLite local persistence. Configuration is read from `.pueblo/config.json` (auto-created with defaults). Build with `npm run build`, test with `npm test`, launch via `node dist/cli/index.js`.
